mapper.select: select to_char(to_date(d.statistics_time,'yyyy-MM-dd')-1,'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime,nvl(t.tableNameEn,'') tableNameEn, nvl(t.tableAllCount,0) totalCount,nvl(yesterdayCount,0) incrementCount from( select TABLE_NAME_EN tableNameEn , TRUNC(TABLE_ALL_COUNT/ 10000, 2) tableAllCount, TRUNC(YESTERDAY_COUNT/10000, 2) yesterdayCount, to_char(statistics_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') statistics_time from table_organization_assets where upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN)=upper(#{tableNameEn}) and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType}) and statistics_time >= TO_DATE(#{beginTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') and statistics_time < TO_DATE(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd hh24:mi:ss') )t right join ( select to_char(to_date(#{beginTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')+ROWNUM-1,'yyyy-MM-dd') statistics_time from dual connect by ROWNUM<=to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')-to_date(#{beginTime},'yyyy-MM-dd') ) d on t.statistics_time = d.statistics_time order by d.statistics_time

select case when table_size = '0' then '0G' when to_char(table_size/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0G' else to_char(table_size/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00')||'G' end as tableAllSize, case when table_all_count = '0' then '0条' when to_char(table_all_count/10000,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0条' else to_char(table_all_count/10000,'fm999999999990.00')||'万条' end as tableAllCount from (select TABLE_TYPE,TABLE_NAME_EN,TABLE_PROJECT,table_size,table_all_count from (SELECT j.TABLE_TYPE,j.TABLE_NAME_EN,j.TABLE_PROJECT,j.table_size,j.table_all_count, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower( TABLE_PROJECT ), upper( TABLE_NAME_EN ) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1) where upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select case when PARTITIONSIZE = '0' then '0' when to_char(PARTITIONSIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(PARTITIONSIZE/1073741824,'fm999999999990.00') end as averageDailySize, case when PARTITIONCOUNT = '0' then '0' when to_char(PARTITIONCOUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00')='0.00' then '0' else to_char(PARTITIONCOUNT/10000,'fm999999999990.00') end as averageDailyCount from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL where partitiondate<to_char(sysdate,'yyyyMMdd') and partitiondate>to_char(sysdate-11,'yyyyMMdd') and TABLETYPE = #{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLEPROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
select TABLE_NAME_CH from SYNLTE.table_register_info where upper(table_name) = #{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH||'->'||SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as organizationClassifyCh, UPDATE_DATE as updateDate,LIFE_CYCLE as lifeCycle from (SELECT j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, case when j.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' then j.THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH else j.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH end as SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH, j.TABLE_TYPE, j.TABLE_NAME_EN, j.TABLE_PROJECT, j.UPDATE_DATE, j.LIFE_CYCLE, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower( TABLE_PROJECT ), upper( TABLE_NAME_EN ) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rnn FROM table_organization_assets j where STATISTICS_TIME >= trunc(sysdate) ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 and upper(TABLE_TYPE) = upper(#{tableType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = upper(#{tableNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and upper(TABLE_PROJECT) = upper(#{tableProject,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
